records.label: Domain
records.standard: Read-only list/detail with linked Requirements and domain posture context.
records.gap: Domain detail should explain the read-only baseline boundary and show linked Requirements consistently.
records.nextSlice: Shared read-only DetailShell for baseline and reference entities.

records.label: Requirement
records.standard: Requirement Workbench remains the reference list/detail/edit/relationship pattern.
records.gap: Delete/archive behaviour is not presented as a first-class Requirement workflow.
records.nextSlice: Preserve the workbench while separating editable assessment fields from linked context.

records.label: Evidence
records.standard: Evidence detail/edit should show linked Requirement context and supported-by relationships.
records.gap: Delete/archive and relationship removal should use the shared destructive and relationship manager pattern.
records.nextSlice: Add evidence relationship removal after the shared relationship manager exists.

records.label: Action
records.standard: Detail-first Action workspace with compact edit form, commentary history, impact, and linked context.
records.gap: Current Action editor combines edit fields, commentary, impact, and commercial context.
records.nextSlice: Split Action detail, commentary, and edit panels while preserving newsletter extraction.

records.label: Risk
records.standard: Risk detail/edit should show score, status, linked Requirements, and treatment links.
records.gap: Treatment relationship management is less direct than Requirement-centred linking.
records.nextSlice: Expose risk treatment relationships through the shared relationship manager.

records.label: Snapshot
records.standard: Read-only history/detail with restore/export affordances where supported.
records.gap: Snapshot browse/detail is not yet presented as a first-class cross-module list.
records.nextSlice: Add generated-record DetailShell after user-owned records are aligned.

records.label: Link
records.standard: Shared relationship manager with allowed endpoints, create, archive/remove, and affected-context preview.
records.gap: Creation is scattered through entity-specific commands and there is no generic link editor.
records.nextSlice: Build the shared relationship manager as the next implementation slice.

records.label: Tag
records.standard: Tag manager plus reusable apply/remove controls wherever taggable records appear.
records.gap: Tag detail is mostly manager-oriented rather than detail-first.
records.nextSlice: Fold tag apply/remove into the shared relationship manager as tagged-with links.

records.label: Saved View
records.standard: One shared saved-view controller for create, rename, archive, apply, and clear.
records.gap: Explorer has duplicated saved-view controls for Requirements and Relationships.
records.nextSlice: Extract shared saved-view and filter controls before adding more list surfaces.

records.label: Source Control
records.standard: Read-only source detail with mapping and work-creation actions.
records.gap: Relationship management is mapping-specific rather than shared.
records.nextSlice: Keep source controls read-only and route mappings through the shared manager where appropriate.

records.label: Requirement Control Mapping
records.standard: Mapping endpoints stay locked while coverage, profile, confidence, and review fields remain editable.
records.gap: Archive/remove mapping needs the shared destructive action pattern.
records.nextSlice: Treat endpoints as relationship manager outputs and mapping fields as the editable detail body.

records.label: Posture
records.standard: Read-only posture detail with traceable source counts and generation context.
records.gap: Posture is not presented through the same generated-record detail shell as other read-only records.
records.nextSlice: Align posture summaries with generated-record detail patterns after editor flows stabilise.

records.label: Direction
records.standard: Baseline Direction fields stay locked; response state and local Direction records are editable.
records.gap: Direction relationship management is still mostly Requirement-centred.
records.nextSlice: Expose Direction-to-Requirement links through the shared relationship manager.

records.label: Change Record
records.standard: Change detail shows public summary, sensitive internal fields, affected records, and publication boundary.
records.gap: Affected-record linking is not yet as discoverable as Requirement workbench linking.
records.nextSlice: Use relationship manager for affected entity references where the contract permits it.

records.label: Supplier
records.standard: Detail-first supplier view with edit action, contracts/spend context, and relationship manager.
records.gap: Shop opens many records directly into edit rather than detail-first.
records.nextSlice: Add Shop DetailShell before changing existing editor fields.

records.label: Contract
records.standard: Detail-first contract view with supplier, dates, value, renewal signals, and relationship manager.
records.gap: Contract relationship controls are command-driven rather than visible in a detail view.
records.nextSlice: Add contract detail view and route links through the shared relationship manager.

records.label: Spend Item
records.standard: Detail-first spend view with forecast, savings, funding, and assurance links.
records.gap: Post-create linking exists, but relationship visibility should be available on record detail.
records.nextSlice: Use Spend Item as the first Shop detail and relationship-manager proof point.

records.label: Strategy
records.standard: Section-level Strategy editor with one area saved at a time and focused relationship subflows.
records.gap: Current Strategy editor is powerful but too large for a single edit panel.
records.nextSlice: Split Strategy frame, choices, outcomes, measures, and links into focused editors.

records.label: Pub Person
records.standard: Local-only person detail/edit with assignments, notes, milestones, resume fields, and privacy boundary.
records.gap: No full person edit/detail panel exists yet and delete/archive is not exposed.
records.nextSlice: After Team editor split, add Pub Person detail and edit panels.

records.label: Pub Team
records.standard: Team detail first, then split edit into ownership, roles, assignments, people, and notes sections.
records.gap: Current Team editor is a large multi-concern edit panel and delete/archive is not exposed.
records.nextSlice: Make Team editor simplification the first Pub UX refactor slice.

records.label: Pub Role
records.standard: Role detail/edit with team ownership, reporting role, assignments, PD fields, and control contribution.
records.gap: Role editing is mostly nested inside the Team editor.
records.nextSlice: Extract Role editor from Team editor after Team ownership split.

records.label: Pub Assignment
records.standard: Assignment detail/edit with person, role, status, allocation, review date, and badge fields.
records.gap: Assignment editing is mostly nested inside the Team editor and lacks relationship-aware delete/archive.
records.nextSlice: Extract Assignment editor after Person and Role details exist.

records.label: Pub Relationship Note
records.standard: Relationship note detail/edit with timestamp, person, summary, next contact, and local-only warning.
records.gap: Notes can be recorded but not edited or archived through a dedicated panel.
records.nextSlice: Add relationship note detail/edit after Pub person detail exists.
